calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-29-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-08-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner William Gargano, Clerk: Carla Amador CSR: Susan Crozier #4761 (Department 218)

Appearances
Plaintiff, Valentin Acosta Estrada, is present.
Attorney, Sally Morin of Millar & Associates, 120 Montgomery Street, #1600, SF CA, is present representing the plaintiff.

Defendant, Christina Castillo Williamson, is not present.
(Default was entered on 11/16/07 as to the defendant)

This cause came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing. Valentin Acosta Estrada is sworn and examined by Sally Morin.

After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant, Christina Castillo Williamson, as follows:

Defendant shall pay plaintiff, as and for damages, the sum of $24,236.12 and cost in the sum of $447.80 for a total Judgment of $24,683.92. Judgment by Court signed in open court.
